combined_text: Is Spelt Safe for a Wheat-Free or Gluten-Free Diet? Is Spelt Safe for a Wheat-Free or Gluten-Free Diet?by Allergy Guy Spelt is sometimes touted as a safe alternative for a wheat -free or gluten free diet.
